# Stanza

Stanza is a portfolio/demo workforce operations platform created by Shady Awad.

## Purpose

Stanza demonstrates authentication, attendance, geofencing, payroll, leave, grievances, company feed, resignations, notifications, PWA behavior, and multi-tenant PostgreSQL/RLS architecture.

## Important Notice

This is a demo/portfolio project. Do not enter real employee, payroll, grievance, or sensitive personal data.

## Public Pages

- Home/Login: https://stanza-demo.onrender.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://stanza-demo.onrender.com/privacy
- Creator Portfolio: https://shadyawad.github.io/portfolio/

## Demo Usage

Demo credentials may be available on the login page for portfolio testing only.

## Data and Privacy

The app may process demo account information, attendance records, geolocation coordinates for geofence validation, payroll demo data, grievances, resignation requests, and notification preferences.

## Contact

Created by Shady Awad.
Portfolio: https://shadyawad.github.io/portfolio/
